description: Authoring mirror for the shared passage-aware Qur’an Study Library. The browser-ready source is js/data/quran-study-library-data.js.

resources.title: Reciting Sūrah al-Fātiḥah Behind the Imām in Prayer
resources.description: Explains the scholarly views and evidences concerning reciting al-Fātiḥah behind the imām in congregational prayer.

resources.title: Repeating al-Fātiḥah in the Prayer
resources.description: Discusses repeating al-Fātiḥah because of forgetfulness or lack of contemplation, along with related rulings.

resources.title: Exemplifying Benefits from Sūrah al-Fātiḥah
resources.description: A collection of beneficial points and lessons drawn from Sūrah al-Fātiḥah.

resources.title: The Foundation: Al-Fātiḥah and the Straight Path
resources.description: Explores foundational lessons from Sūrah al-Fātiḥah and the meaning of the Straight Path.

resources.title: Changing Our Lives Through Sūrah al-Fātiḥah
resources.description: Highlights practical lessons from Sūrah al-Fātiḥah and how its guidance can shape daily life and worship.
